      "question": "What is the primary cause of the severe air pollution episode in Delhi in 2019?",

      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "The primary cause of the severe air pollution episode in Delhi in 2019 was crop burning. Large areas of land were burned in neighboring states, releasing massive amounts of particulate matter and other pollutants into the ai
